---
title: "The machines are not, in fact, fine."
author: "Boxo McFoxo"
date: "2026-04-06"
date-added: "2026-04-11"
categories: [AI, criticism, writing, LLMs]
status: to-read
url: "https://boxobarks.leaflet.pub/3misaejnoqs2k"
---

A response to Minas Karamanis's viral essay, arguing it was generated by Claude and not written by the author — examining AI detection, obfuscation, and how LLM style markers deceive readers.

[Read the full article →](https://boxobarks.leaflet.pub/3misaejnoqs2k)
